view.title: View VPS {id}
view.reinstallNote: You can reinstall from left menu
view.cpanelNote: Control panel needs to be installed on a clean OS install with no modifications. If there is any data it will be lost.
view.resendWelcomeEmailConfirm: Are you sure you want to resend the welcome email?
view.emailSentMessage: The welcome email has been resent. Check your inbox.

order.title: Order VPS
order.rootPasswordNote: Note: Password must contain at least 8 characters, one lowercase letter, one uppercase letter, one number, and a special character.
order.subscriptionRenewal: The subscription will automatically renew after {period} at {cost} until canceled.
order.tosAcknowledgment: By checking this box, you acknowledge that you are purchasing a subscription product that automatically renews and is billed to the credit card you provide today. If you wish to cancel your auto-renewal, you may access the customer portal select the active service and click the Cancel link or email at: billing{'@'}interserver.net or use another method outlined in the Terms and Conditions. By checking the box and clicking Place My Order below, you also acknowledge you have read, understand, and agree to our Terms and Conditions and Privacy Policy.
order.tosAgree: I have read the terms above and I agree.

buyIp.title: Additional IP Addon for your VPS

buyHdSpace.title: Additional VPS Drive Space
buyHdSpace.spaceNote: Minimum 1 up to 100GB additional HD space can be purchased

changeRootPassword.title: Change VPS Root Password
changeRootPassword.passwordMismatch: Password and Confirm Password do not match

changeTimezone.title: Change {module} Timezone
changeTimezone.importantNote1: You should turn your {module} off completely before changing the time zone.
changeTimezone.importantNote2: VPS will be Powered OFF and restarted during the process.
changeTimezone.importantNote3: The timezone on this page will always default to America/New_York regardless of what your server is set to.

changeWebuzoPassword.title: Change Webuzo Admin Password
changeWebuzoPassword.passwordMismatch: Password and Confirm Password do not match

reinstallOs.title: Reinstall OS
reinstallOs.importantNote1: Re-installing the operating system will delete all data.
reinstallOs.importantNote2: Before re-installing the operating system, please take a backup.
reinstallOs.confirmReinstall: I want to re-install the OS!

resetPassword.title: Reset VPS Password
resetPassword.windowsWarning: Windows password reset will result in an unclean shut down. Please consider this a last resort option. Verify in VNC that no updates are currently running. If an update is running VNC will show: Windows is applying updates, do not shut down. Shutting down in this state can result in an unbootable machine.
resetPassword.confirmReset: I want to Reset the Password!

reverseDns.title: Reverse DNS
reverseDns.dnsChangeNote: Changes to reverse DNS take up to an hour to show up.

vnc.remoteDesktopDescription: Available only on the Windows Platform. Remote desktop is a quick and convenient way to connect to a virtual machine's desktop.
vnc.remoteDesktopStep1: The Administrator password must first be set on the VPS before you can use remote desktop.
vnc.remoteDesktopStep2: Connect with VNC or HTML5 VNC to set your initial password.
vnc.remoteDesktopNote: For a remote desktop tutorial click
vnc.desktopVncDescription: VNC allows you to connect to the virtual machine's desktop. VNC can be run in the browser or as a stand-alone client. Your computer's IP address must be granted access before the connection can be established.
vnc.grantIpAccess: Grant Your IP access to VNC
vnc.grantIpWait: Please wait 2 minutes for the action to complete.
vnc.vncClientNote: You can also download one of the many VNC clients available on the internet. We recommend TightVNC. Connect using your VPS IP address. Password is not required after your remote IP address has been granted in step 1.
vnc.connectHtml5: To connect using HTML5 VNC Client:
vnc.html5Note: HTML5 VNC client that runs well in any modern browser including mobile browsers (iOS and Android).

insertCd.insertIso: Insert ISO Image In CDROM Drive
insertCd.urlPlaceholder: Enter a CD or DVD ISO URL

backup.backupsPartitionNote: Backups will only work with default partitioning.
backup.confirmBackup: Do you really want to take backup?

restore.offlineNote: Your server will be offline while it replaces all your current files with those on the backup. Please contact support with any questions.
restore.loginPasswordLabel: Enter Login Password to Validate Restore.
restore.confirmRestore: Do you really want to restore this backup?

trafficUsage.title: Bandwidth / Traffic Usage
trafficUsage.billingNote: This is not used for billing calculations and is an estimate only based on your virtual network cards.

slices.title: Upgrade / Downgrade Slices
slices.slicesNote: Up to 32 Slices can be attached to a VPS.
slices.proratedNote: Prorated amount to be paid now.
slices.recurringBillNote: Recurring bill will change by this much
slices.newInvoiceNote: New invoices will cost this much
slices.confirmLabel: Yes I want to do this.
